reactor.name: home-built hot-wall stainless steel tube reactor

processParameters.substrate: Si substrate coated with 100 nm of thermally grown SiO2
processParameters.deliveryMethod: Pulsed gas dosing with metering valves

electricalProperties.characterizationMethod: in situ conductance measurements and ex situ four-point probe

deviceProperties.deviceStructure: Cr/Au electrodes on Si/SiO2 substrate with ZnO film
